label: Causal representation learning

node.label: Causal representation learning
node.definition: Representations aim to recover stable causal factors and mechanisms rather than only predictive correlations.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Causal representation learning is to connect Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state to downstream capabilities including Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins, Medical imaging & clinical decision support.
examples: substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
substrate for Medical imaging & clinical decision support
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Causal inference, Latent variables & hidden state.

dependencies.rationale: Causal representation learning uses Causal inference as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Causal representation learning uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Causal representation learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
Causal representation learning follows the learning setup expressed by Unsupervised learning.
